title: tragacantha pannosa
intro: Tragacantha pannosa, also known as Astragalus pannosus or woolly milk vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha pannosa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to promote relaxation and ease congestion.
